name: funnelAnalysis
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.stages.every(function(s){ return Number.isFinite(s.count) && Number.isFinite(s.dropoff) && Number.isFinite(s.conversionFromTop) && typeof s.stage === 'string'; })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'analytics.funnelAnalysis'. Component (AnalyticsActionPanel.tsx) sends {artifact:{data:{stages:[{name,count}]}}} → dispatch peels one wrapper → artifact.data = {stages:[...]}. Returns {stages:[{stage,count,dropoff,conversionFromTop}],overallConversion,worstDropoff,worstDropoffRate}. POISON: count via finInt so '1e999'/'Infinity'/'NaN' collapse to a FINITE int; non-array stages degrades to a guidance message instead of throwing. Pinned by server/tests/analytics-lens-macros.test.js.
